start.speaker: Faithful
start.text: Well met, brother! We came different roads but to the same City. This fair hates us both — shall we stand in it together?
start.text_zh: 弟兄，幸会！我们走的路不同，去的城却是同一座。这集市恨我们两个——我们就在其中一同站立，好吗？

choices.text: Together. Whatever they do, we will not buy what they sell.
choices.text_zh: 一同站立。无论他们怎样行，我们都不买他们所卖的。

choices.text: I am afraid of this place — but I would rather be afraid beside you than safe alone.
choices.text_zh: 我怕这地方——但我宁可与你一同惧怕，也不愿独自苟安。
